New Christian Dior sunglasses #Jay Chou #Jiang Shuying same style sunglasses, currently the most popular style! DiorSignature S7F upgraded version sunglasses. This DiorSignature S7F sunglasses reinterpret classic design with a modern casual square design, showcasing high-end craftsmanship. Featuring a unique black acetate fiber frame with the Christian Dior Paris logo highlighted, gold lines extending to the front. Paired with grey nylon lenses for a more refined look. Suitable for both men and women, versatile for all face shapes. Size: 58-18-145.
